summary: Iteration 94: Recurring Sessions Feature - All backend APIs (17/17 tests passed) and frontend UI verified. Feature fully functional.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed recurring sessions during testing (daily, weekdays, weekends, weekly)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 94 Recurring Sessions feature fully tested. Key data-testids: live-sessions-page, tab-live, tab-schedule, create-session-btn, create-session-modal, mode-onetime, mode-recurring, session-title-input, recurrence-daily, recurrence-weekdays, recurrence-weekends, recurrence-weekly, day-{0-6}, time-utc-input, create-session-submit, recurring-card-{id}, subscribe-btn-{id}. Backend endpoints: POST /api/live/recurring, GET /api/live/recurring, POST /api/live/recurring/{id}/subscribe, DELETE /api/live/recurring/{id}/subscribe, GET /api/live/recurring/subscriptions, POST /api/live/recurring/spawn.

create_recurring_session_api.details: POST /api/live/recurring creates recurring session with recurrence types: daily, weekdays, weekends, weekly. Creator is auto-subscribed. Returns session with id, next_occurrence, subscriber_count=1.

list_recurring_sessions_api.details: GET /api/live/recurring returns all active recurring sessions with is_subscribed boolean. Subscribers array is stripped from response.

subscribe_api.details: POST /api/live/recurring/{id}/subscribe subscribes user and increments subscriber_count. Returns 'already_subscribed' if already subscribed. Returns 404 for nonexistent series.

unsubscribe_api.details: DELETE /api/live/recurring/{id}/subscribe unsubscribes user and decrements subscriber_count.

my_subscriptions_api.details: GET /api/live/recurring/subscriptions returns only sessions user is subscribed to with is_subscribed=true.

spawn_api.details: POST /api/live/recurring/spawn spawns sessions from recurring templates due within 15 minutes. Advances next_occurrence after spawning.

frontend_tabs.details: Live Sessions page has two tabs: 'Live & Upcoming' and 'Recurring Schedule'. Tab switching works correctly.

recurring_schedule_tab.details: Recurring Schedule tab shows recurring session cards with subscribe buttons, recurrence labels, time, subscriber count, and next occurrence.

create_modal_toggle.details: Create Session modal has One-Time/Recurring toggle. Switching to Recurring shows recurrence options.

recurring_options_ui.details: When Recurring is selected: Daily, Weekdays, Weekends, Weekly options appear. Time picker (UTC) is shown. Weekly selection shows day-of-week picker (Mon-Sun).

create_recurring_via_ui.details: Creating a recurring session via UI works. After creation, redirects to Recurring Schedule tab and new card appears.

subscribe_toggle_ui.details: Subscribe/Unsubscribe button toggles correctly on recurring cards. Shows 'Subscribe' when not subscribed, 'Subscribed' when subscribed.
